programs.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programs.desc: The original 80s animation classic that follows a young orphan called Esteban as he searches the New World for both his father and the mysterious Cities of Gold.

programs.title: Chums
programs.desc: Turtles begin to appear everywhere, causing chaos, so the Chums must help the turtles find their home by the creek.

programs.title: Motown Magic

programs.desc: Imaginative boy Ben transforms his city by bringing colourful street art to life, armed with a magic paintbrush and the classic sounds of Motown.

programs.title: Harlem Globetrotters: Play It Forward
programs.desc: Wham visits an organization that supports veterans to surprise his cousin Ira with a skydiving experience.

programs.title: Garma: Celebrating 25 Years
programs.desc: Stories from Yolngu Country celebrating 25 years of Garma.
